iam.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

checks.name: MFA Enabled for Root Account
checks.description: Ensure MFA is enabled on the root AWS account
checks.remediation: Enable MFA on root account via AWS IAM console

checks.name: MFA Enabled for IAM Users
checks.description: Ensure MFA is enabled for all IAM users with console access
checks.remediation: Enforce MFA via IAM password policy or SCPs

checks.name: No Unused IAM Credentials
checks.description: Disable or remove IAM credentials unused for 90+ days
checks.remediation: Audit IAM credential report and disable stale credentials

checks.name: IAM Policies Least Privilege
checks.description: Ensure IAM policies follow principle of least privilege
checks.remediation: Review and tighten IAM policies using IAM Access Analyzer

checks.name: No Inline IAM Policies
checks.description: Avoid use of inline IAM policies; use managed policies instead
checks.remediation: Convert inline policies to managed policies

checks.name: IAM Access Keys Rotated
checks.description: Ensure IAM access keys are rotated every 90 days
checks.remediation: Rotate access keys and enforce rotation policy

s3.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls / C1 - Confidentiality

checks.name: S3 Bucket Public Access Blocked
checks.description: Ensure all S3 buckets block public access
checks.remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access at account and bucket level

checks.name: S3 Bucket Encryption Enabled
checks.description: Ensure S3 buckets have server-side encryption enabled
checks.remediation: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS on all S3 buckets

checks.name: S3 Bucket Versioning Enabled
checks.description: Enable versioning on S3 buckets storing critical data
checks.remediation: Enable versioning and configure lifecycle policies

checks.name: S3 Bucket Logging Enabled
checks.description: Ensure S3 access logging is enabled on all buckets
checks.remediation: Enable S3 server access logging or CloudTrail S3 data events

checks.name: S3 Bucket MFA Delete Enabled
checks.description: Enable MFA Delete on critical S3 buckets
checks.remediation: Enable MFA Delete on S3 buckets with sensitive data

ec2.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls / CC7 - System Operations

checks.name: No Default VPC Usage
checks.description: Avoid using the default VPC for production workloads
checks.remediation: Create a custom VPC with proper network segmentation

checks.name: Security Groups Restrict Inbound
checks.description: Ensure no security group allows unrestricted inbound access (0.0.0.0/0) on sensitive ports
checks.remediation: Restrict security group inbound rules to known CIDRs

checks.name: EBS Volume Encryption
checks.description: Ensure all EBS volumes are encrypted at rest
checks.remediation: Enable EBS default encryption at the account level

checks.name: EC2 Instances Patched
checks.description: Ensure EC2 instances are regularly patched using AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager
checks.remediation: Configure SSM Patch Manager with a patch baseline

checks.name: EC2 IMDSv2 Enforced
checks.description: Require IMDSv2 on all EC2 instances to prevent SSRF attacks
checks.remediation: Set HttpTokens to 'required' on all EC2 instances

rds.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls / C1 - Confidentiality

checks.name: RDS Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Ensure all RDS instances are encrypted at rest
checks.remediation: Enable encryption when creating RDS instances; snapshot + restore for existing

checks.name: RDS Not Publicly Accessible
checks.description: Ensure RDS instances are not publicly accessible
checks.remediation: Set PubliclyAccessible to false and place in private subnet

checks.name: RDS Automated Backups Enabled
checks.description: Ensure RDS automated backups are enabled with retention >= 7 days
checks.remediation: Set backup retention period to at least 7 days

checks.name: RDS Multi-AZ Enabled
checks.description: Enable Multi-AZ for production RDS instances
checks.remediation: Enable Multi-AZ deployment for production databases

checks.name: RDS Minor Version Auto-Upgrade
checks.description: Enable automatic minor version upgrades for RDS
checks.remediation: Enable AutoMinorVersionUpgrade on RDS instances

checks.name: CloudTrail Enabled in All Regions
checks.description: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled across all AWS regions
checks.remediation: Create a multi-region CloudTrail trail

checks.name: CloudTrail Log File Validation
checks.description: Ensure CloudTrail log file integrity validation is enabled
checks.remediation: Enable log file validation on CloudTrail trail

checks.name: CloudTrail Logs Encrypted
checks.description: Ensure CloudTrail logs are encrypted with KMS
checks.remediation: Configure CloudTrail to use a KMS CMK for log encryption

checks.name: CloudWatch Alarms for CloudTrail Events
checks.description: Set up CloudWatch metric filters and alarms for key CloudTrail events
checks.remediation: Create metric filters for root login, unauthorized API calls, MFA changes

kms.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls / C1 - Confidentiality

checks.name: KMS Key Rotation Enabled
checks.description: Ensure automatic annual key rotation is enabled for KMS CMKs
checks.remediation: Enable key rotation on all applicable KMS CMKs

checks.name: KMS Key Policies Restrict Access
checks.description: Ensure KMS key policies do not allow wildcard principal access
checks.remediation: Review and restrict KMS key policies to specific principals

vpc.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

checks.name: VPC Flow Logs Enabled
checks.description: Enable VPC Flow Logs for all VPCs
checks.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs and send to CloudWatch Logs or S3

checks.name: Network ACLs Restrict Traffic
checks.description: Ensure Network ACLs do not allow unrestricted inbound/outbound traffic
checks.remediation: Configure NACLs with explicit allow/deny rules

checks.name: GuardDuty Enabled
checks.description: Ensure GuardDuty is enabled in all regions
checks.remediation: Enable GuardDuty and configure alerting via SNS

checks.name: AWS Config Enabled
checks.description: Ensure AWS Config is enabled in all regions to track configuration changes
checks.remediation: Enable AWS Config with a delivery channel in all regions

security_policies.category: CC1 - Control Environment / CC2 - Communication and Information

checks.name: Information Security Policy Documented
checks.description: Company maintains a written information security policy reviewed annually

checks.name: Acceptable Use Policy
checks.description: Employees acknowledge an Acceptable Use Policy for company assets and systems

checks.name: Incident Response Plan
checks.description: A documented Incident Response Plan (IRP) is in place and tested annually

checks.name: Change Management Policy
checks.description: Formal change management process with approvals for production changes

checks.name: Business Continuity / Disaster Recovery Plan
checks.description: BCP/DRP is documented, tested at least annually, and includes AWS failover procedures

access_management.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

checks.name: User Access Review
checks.description: Conduct quarterly access reviews for all systems including AWS

checks.name: Onboarding / Offboarding Procedures
checks.description: Formal procedures ensure timely provisioning and de-provisioning of access

checks.name: Privileged Access Management
checks.description: Privileged access (admin, root) is restricted, monitored, and reviewed

checks.name: Vendor / Third-Party Access Controls
checks.description: Third-party access to systems is formally approved, limited, and reviewed

risk_management.category: CC3 - Risk Assessment / CC9 - Risk Mitigation

checks.name: Annual Risk Assessment
checks.description: Company performs a formal risk assessment at least annually

checks.name: Vendor Risk Management
checks.description: Third-party vendors handling company data are assessed for security controls

checks.name: Vulnerability Management Program
checks.description: Regular vulnerability scanning and penetration testing are conducted

checks.name: Background Checks
checks.description: Background checks are performed for all employees prior to system access

checks.name: Security Awareness Training
checks.description: All employees complete security awareness training annually

checks.name: Code of Conduct
checks.description: All employees review and sign a Code of Conduct upon hire and annually

checks.name: Centralized Log Management
checks.description: Logs from all systems (AWS, application, infrastructure) are aggregated centrally

checks.name: Security Alerting and Response
checks.description: Alerts are configured for security events and reviewed by the security team

checks.name: Log Retention Policy
checks.description: Logs are retained for a minimum of 12 months per policy

checks.name: Secure SDLC Practices
checks.description: Security is integrated into the software development lifecycle (SAST, DAST, code review)

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Development, staging, and production environments are logically separated

checks.name: Production Deployment Approvals
checks.description: All production deployments require peer review and approval

checks.name: Data Classification Policy
checks.description: Data is classified by sensitivity (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted)

checks.name: Data Retention and Disposal Policy
checks.description: Formal policies govern data retention periods and secure disposal procedures

checks.name: Data Encryption in Transit
checks.description: All data in transit uses TLS 1.2 or higher

checks.name: Privacy Policy and GDPR/CCPA Compliance
checks.description: Company maintains a privacy policy and complies with applicable data privacy regulations
